en.reference_text: a little girl sees her cat stuck in a tree her father climbs a ladder to rescue the cat the ladder falls and the fire department comes to help
a family is riding in a car children and a dog look out the windows and the driver keeps the car moving while the passengers watch outside
a boy goes outside without an umbrella it starts raining he gets wet and returns to get the umbrella
a tour bus comes into town to pick people up at a hotel and take them on an outing
cinderella does work around the house goes to the ball meets the prince leaves her shoe behind and is found by the prince

el.reference_text: κτίριο σπίτι σχήμα πι δύο όροφοι εσωτερική αυλή πόρτα παράθυρα σκάλες στέγη κεραμίδια πέτρα
